import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { MoreVertical, Check, X, Filter, Download, Search, Eye, MessageSquare } from 'lucide-react'; import ApprovalModal from './ApprovalModal'; const StatusBadge = ({ status }) => { const styles = { 'Approved': 'bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border-green-500/20', 'Pending': 'bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500 border-yellow-500/20', 'Rejected': 'bg-mas-red/10 text-mas-red border-mas-red/20', 'Checked In': 'bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-500 border-blue-500/20', 'Checked Out': 'bg-mas-text-dim/10 text-mas-text-dim border-mas-text-dim/20', }; return ( {status} ); }; const VisitorTable = () => { const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); useEffect(() => { const timer = setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 1200); return () => clearTimeout(timer); }, []); const visitors = [ { id: "MAS-VAS-001", name: 'Adithya Bandara', nic: '958273645V', contact: '+94 77 123 4567', email: 'adithya@example.com', date: '2026-03-25', timeIn: '08:30 AM', purpose: 'BUSINESS MEETING', visitorCount: 1, vehicle: 'WP CAS-1234 (Car)', areas: ['MAIN RECEPTION', 'PRODUCTION FLOOR 2'], status: 'Approved', contactPerson: 'Saman Kumara', equipment: [] }, { id: "MAS-VAS-002", name: 'Kasun Perera', nic: '921123456V', contact: '+94 71 987 6543', email: 'kasun@gmail.com', date: '2026-03-25', timeIn: '09:15 AM', purpose: 'CLIENT VISIT', visitorCount: 3, vehicle: 'None', areas: ['ADMIN BLOCK'], status: 'Pending', contactPerson: 'Nimali Silva', equipment: ['Laptop (1)', 'Projector (1)'] }, { id: "MAS-VAS-003", name: 'Sarah Jenkins', nic: 'N/A (Passport)', contact: '+44 20 7123 4567', email: 'sarah.j@global.com', date: '2026-03-24', timeIn: '10:00 AM', purpose: 'TECHNICAL AUDIT', visitorCount: 1, vehicle: 'WP KN-5566 (Van)', areas: ['IT DEPARTMENT', 'DATA CENTER'], status: 'Checked Out', contactPerson: 'Rohit Sharma', equipment: ['Diagnostic Kit (2)'] }, ]; if (loading) return (
